title: Creative Creations
description: Creative Creations Is a ModPack Using The Create Mod And A Few Additional Addons and survival mods So You Can Create The Worlds best Factory!
body:
## This Modpack will no longer be Receiving Updates

## What Is This Modpack?
**This Modpack is aiming to Make Minecraft a industrial experiance with the create Mod And A Few Addons For It and survival Elements**

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

## Libraries:

Architectury API
Botarium

## Mods:

Create (Forge) |
Create: Big Cannons |
Create: Crafts & Addition |
Create: Deco |
Create: Goggles |
Create: Mechanical spawner |
Create: Ore Excavation |
Create: Bells & Whistles |
Create: Design n' Decor |
Create: Diesel Generator |
Create: Interiors |
Create: New Age |
Create: Steam 'n' Rails |
Create: Structures |
BiomesOPlenty |
ToughAsNails |
serene seasons |

</details>
